hero.subtext: Personalized registered massage and manual osteopathic therapy designed for your body’s unique needs. In a warm, welcoming space, I take the time to listen, assess, and create a treatment plan that works for you.

about.bio:
Hi there! I'm a passionate Massage Therapist and Manual Osteopathic Therapist based in Saskatoon, SK, with regular visits to my hometown, Tisdale. My approach focuses on identifying and treating the cause of your discomfort so you can experience lasting results, not just temporary relief. Whether you’re experiencing chronic tension, injury recovering, postural issues, or stress, I’m here to help you feel better, move freely, and get back to doing what you love! 

Outside of my practice, I enjoy dancing, live music, staying active, spending time in nature, and soaking up the summer sun, alongside my encouraging family and their unwavering support.

If you’re curious about my business name, it’s inspired by my Tisdale roots, formerly known by its connection to canola (“the land of rape and honey”), and my previous adventures working on a bee farm. In that time, I learnt to appreciate the role bees play in maintaining balance in our ecosystem. To me, they represent community, resilience and natural healing, values I bring into my practice by creating a welcoming, balanced, and therapeutic environment.
about.credentials: Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) & Manual Osteopathic Therapist (MOT)
about.location: Integrative Therapies Health Collective, 1647 29th St W, Saskatoon, SK

bookingCta.heading: Book Your Session
bookingCta.subtext: Online booking is fast and easy through Jane App. Prefer to reach out first? Text me for the fastest response.
